# UniversalCrawlerProplus

UniversalCrawlerProplus is a PyQt6 + FastAPI crawler and media download application. It coordinates desktop GUI flows, Web UI APIs, crawler spiders, media playback, download workers, and runtime configuration through explicit signal, event, and thread boundaries.

## Tech stack

- Python 3
- PyQt6 desktop GUI
- FastAPI and WebSocket Web UI services
- Playwright-based crawler helpers
- Threaded workers, Qt signals, EventBus, and bounded dispatch semaphores
- pytest test suite

## Entry files

- `main.py`: main application launcher.
- `entry/dispatcher.py`: startup mode routing.
- `app/config/settings.py`: ConfigManager singleton and runtime configuration entrypoint.
- `app/controllers/application_controller.py`: desktop application orchestration.
- `app/web/controller.py`: Web UI controller.
- `app/spiders/base.py`: shared spider runtime, navigation helpers, and crawler guardrails.
- `app/core/download_manager_core.py`: download dispatch semaphore core.

## Rule files

- `rules/index.md`: agent and synchronization safety rules.
- `.trae/rules/agent-native-engineering.md`: native engineering workflow rules.
- `.trae/rules/resilience.md`: resilience and failure-handling rules.
- `.trae/rules/security-baseline.md`: security baseline rules.

## Documentation index

- `SIGNAL_BASELINE_REPORT.md`: baseline signal/semaphore audit report.
- `docs/adr/0001-signal-semaphore-hardening.md`: signal, semaphore, EventBus, and guardrail ADR.
- `docs/architecture.md`: system architecture.
- `docs/config.md`: runtime configuration behavior.
- `docs/api.md`: HTTP/Web API notes.
- `docs/testing.md`: testing guidance.
- `docs/development.md`: development workflow.
- `docs/cli/CLI_GUIDE.md`: CLI usage.
- `docs/cli/API_REFERENCE.md`: CLI/API reference.
- `docs/postmortems/clear-queue-409-freeze.md`: clear-queue freeze postmortem.
- `docs/postmortems/missav-surrit-hls-403-local-proxy.md`: MissAV HLS proxy postmortem.

## Test entrypoints

- `python -m pytest`: full test suite.
- `python -m pytest tests/test_spider_base.py tests/test_media_preview_panel.py tests/test_download_manager_core.py -q`: focused signal/guardrail/media checks.
- `python -m pytest tests/test_main_window.py tests/test_ui_update_scheduler.py tests/test_websocket_server.py tests/test_fastapi_endpoints.py -q`: GUI/Web/API regression checks.
- `python main.py`: application startup smoke check.
